description: Path A manuscript view: per-candidate Mendelian-error rate inside an inversion, conditioned on karyotype groups; requires the full relatedness → pedigree → mendelian chain plus karyotype call sheet.
label: Mendelian panel

description: Path B manuscript view: per-candidate windowed FST / dxy / piN / piS between karyotype groups inside an inversion candidate.
label: Popstats panel

description: Page 3 (Registries) renders ngsRelate → ngsPedigree green-light bricks; each brick resolves its layer.
label: Relatedness chain strip

description: Page 4 (Catalogue) lists every analysis_result layer the registry knows about and its current resolution state.
label: Catalogue grid

description: Manuscript vertical-slice page (page 6). Two required panels (the candidate interval table + the karyotype-call sheet) plus four optional panels (long-range haplotype regimes, popstats, Mendelian, FST). Per LAYER_GRAPH_BUILDER_SPEC.md §11.
label: Candidate review
